name: SCANSOURCE, INC.
summary: ScanSource, Inc. is a leading technology distributor incorporated in South Carolina in 1992, connecting devices to the cloud for approximately 25,000 channel sales partners. It distributes hardware, SaaS, connectivity, and cloud services from over 500 suppliers including Cisco, Zebra, Microsoft, and Verizon. Operating through two segments—Specialty Technology Solutions and Intelisys & Advisory—it serves markets in the United States, Canada, and Brazil, with fiscal year 2025 net sales of $3.04 billion.

products.name: Mobility and Barcode Solutions
products.description: Mobile computing, barcode scanners, RFID devices, barcode printing and related services.

products.name: Point of Sale Systems
products.description: POS systems and integrated POS software platforms for retail and hospitality.

products.name: Payment Terminals
products.description: Self-service kiosks, self-checkout, payment terminals and mobile payment devices.

products.name: Physical Security Solutions
products.description: Video surveillance, analytics, video management software and access control products.

products.name: Networking Products
products.description: Switching, routing, wireless products and software from leading suppliers.

products.name: Communications Solutions
products.description: Voice, video, communication platform integration and contact center solutions.

products.name: Connectivity Services
products.description: Managed connectivity and wireless enablement solutions for channel partners.

products.name: Intelisys TSD Platform
products.description: Technology services distribution platform for connectivity, cloud and next-generation technologies via agency sales model.

products.name: Channel Exchange (formerly intY USA)
products.description: SaaS and subscription-based services platform for channel sales partners.

products.name: RPM Software
products.description: Proprietary software tool supporting channel sales partner operations within Intelisys & Advisory segment.

products.name: Integrated Solutions Group
products.description: Solution selling service enabling flexible, multi-supplier technology bundles for channel partners.

partnerships.description: Three non-exclusive distribution agreements covering US, Brazil, and North America agency contract; products exceed 10% of net sales.
Three non-exclusive agreements covering EVM and AIT product sales in North America and Brazil; products exceed 10% of net sales.
